sentence_reviews.text: A multilayer perceptron stacks affine transformations and nonlinear activations to learn general nonlinear mappings over fixed-size feature vectors.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Ch. 6 deep feedforward networks / MLPs; AIMA neural network learning topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Stacked affine layers and nonlinear activations are directly supported; 'general nonlinear mappings' is a concise synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with Affine transforms & dense layers
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Ch. 6 feedforward networks constructed from affine transformations and nonlinear activations.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dense affine layers are directly part of MLPs.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Affine transforms & dense layers, Nonlinear activations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Multilayer perceptrons is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Affine transforms & dense layers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Ch. 6 feedforward network layers.
sentence_reviews.notes: MLPs are stacks of dense affine layers.

sentence_reviews.text: Multilayer perceptrons is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Nonlinear activations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Ch. 6 activation functions in feedforward networks.
sentence_reviews.notes: Nonlinear activations are core MLP components.

sentence_reviews.text: Multilayer perceptrons follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning supervised feedforward network examples; AIMA neural-network learning topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: MLPs are commonly trained under supervised learning, though they are also used in self-supervised and unsupervised systems.
